expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly breaks out scenarios for "Data label visibility (single slice)", "Data label visibility (few slices)", "Label density handling (many slices)", and "Overlap-sensitive outcomes (crowded labels)" plus resize/zoom stability. execution_notes.md also states: "Explicitly covered benchmark focus: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md: "Primary phase targeted: Phase 4a" and "Structure respected: central topic → subcategory → scenarios → atomic nested action chain → observable verification leaves." result.md matches this Phase 4a subcategory-only structure (single top topic with bullet subcategories and step/verify leaves) and avoids forbidden top-layer categories as noted: "Avoided forbidden Phase 4a structure: no canonical top-layer categories".
